case_title: LING LA VS. J.P. MORGAN BANK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LA, LING AS TO DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **NO SIGNATURE** SERVED JAN-24-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN BANK
*NOTICE TO ADVERSE PARTY OF REMOVAL FILED BY DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN BANK
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LA, LING AS TO DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN BANK
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE DONE ON 2/7/22 (SERVICE FEE $49.50) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LA, LING AS TO DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN BANK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2022 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO APR-12-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LING LA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN BANK IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT STATES THAT SHE HAS NOT BEEN SERVED WITH THE NOTICE TO ADVERSE PARTY OF REMOVAL TO FEDERAL COURT. THIS CASE IS CONTINUE FOR DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE TO THE COURT THE STATUS OF THE SERVICE ON THE PLAINTIFF FOR THE NOTICE OF REMOVAL TO FEDERAL COURT. PLAINTIFF MAY APPEAR VIA ZOOM AT THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE: STATUS ON SERVICE.
ORDER DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KATHY ZUMSKI. (AUTHORIZATION SUBMITTED ELECTRONICALLY AT THE TIME OF HEARING. MS.ZUMSKI STATES THAT HER ADOBE PROGRAM DOES NOT ALLOW FOR E-SIGNATURE) FILED BY DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN BANK

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF LING LA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN BANK, REPRESENTED BY KATHY ZUMSKI, PARALEGAL, IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S UNATHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE IS ALLOWED FOR TODAY'S MATTER. DEFENDANT MUST TIMELY FILE A REQEUST FOR ZOOM APPEARANCE IN THE RELATED CASE CSM-22-865403 LING LA V. J.P. MORGAN CHASE. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
